item.title: GoHugo tips and tricks, moving away from wordpress
item.description: Some useful tips and tricks for Hugo blog owner

item.title: I cleaned my blog…removed 3200 posts!
item.description: It is a sad day when your delete lots of posts in your personal blog, some posts were as old as 1997, but why cleaning blog of old articles is a good move?
